caption: A screen recording captures a web browser with several open tabs, including titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemicity," "Future of Society by Systemicity," and "Road Community Food Spot." The main content of the browser is a video call featuring a man wearing a black baseball cap and a dark shirt in a small window in the upper right corner. The rest of the screen displays a complex conceptual map with various circular icons connected by blue lines. These icons contain images and text, including "The-Common-Good," "The-Economy," "The-Government," and "The-Environment." The map's layout remains static across the sequence. In the first frame, the video call window is larger and positioned more centrally; in the subsequent frames, it shifts slightly, and the man's head moves slightly as he speaks, while the overall browser layout and the conceptual map remain consistent.
